ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-19-2023 Continued To May-17-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-04-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James O'Neil, via Zoom, for Kay LaChappel and Frances Madrile, via Zoom, Petitioners; Nicole Kelly, via Zoom, for Jovahnka Alvarado, Petitioner; Nushka Vesper, via Zoom, in propria persona, Interested Party.

The court points to Ms. Kelly's recent submissions for filing which are pending in the court's efiling queue. Ms. Kelly offers oral testimony regarding withdrawing her clients petition and confirms that her client neither approves nor objects to Scott Hodges being appointed to serve as Administrator. Mr. O'Neil advises that he is withdrawing his filed objection, on the record. Ms. Vesper advises that she is orally objecting to the appointment of Scott Hodges and advises that she should be appointed instead. Mr. O'Neil reports that this matter has been continued multiple times which offered parties ample opportunity to formally file objections and of the contentious family history which would support the appointment of a neutral as Administrator.

After additional discussion, the court overrules Ms. Vesper's objection and grants the Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Kay LaChappel and Frances Madrile. Scott Hodges is appointed Administrator of the Estate with full authority. Bond is set at $1,200,000. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Apr-19-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Jovahnka Alvarado is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.
